raw_consumer_statement: I did XXXX transactions using my American Express Blue XXXX XXXX credit card on XXXX XX/XX/year> ( posted on XXXX XX/XX/year> on credit card ) on XXXX XXXX website for ticket upgrade but I did not receive full round-trip ticket which I paid for. I called XXXX to solve issue but I did not receive any resolution. I was booking other tickets which were depending on this previous ticket so I had to call American Express and file dispute for these transaction on XXXX XX/XX/year>. I also booked new ticket for same trip so I can book other depended tickets as well. I requested only refund as resolution for dispute after reaching to that point. XXXX provided complete ticket on XXXX XX/XX/year> when I was too late and not needed anymore. American Express closed my dispute stating that airline has provided ticket. I reopened dispute and provided all information but American Express closed my dispute again stating that I should contact airline. XXXX, American Express not providing any support.
